g.text: one action at a time; no cross-task memory;
a lookalike page can pass similarity validation
trajectory DAG of the entire flow
expect + verify gates on live state
their per-action cache is a special case of Rote's
site memory (docs/15: D3/D4 subsume Stagehand C2)
Why Rote wins: Stagehand memoizes one action at a time, inside its own cloud,
and trusts a similar-looking page. Rote memoizes the entire flow, proves each
replay by asserted outcomes, and carries that memory to any backend --
